{% extends "!footer.html" %} {% block extrafooter %} {{ super() }} {% set doc_title = title|striptags %} {% if doc_title == '' %} {% set doc_title = project ~ ' Documentation' %} {% endif %} {% if docs_public_base_url %} {% set doc_page = docs_public_base_url ~ pagename ~ '.html' %} {% elif pageurl %} {% set doc_page = pageurl %} {% else %} {% set doc_page = pagename ~ '.html' %} {% endif %} {% set issue_title = ('Docs issue: ' ~ doc_title) | urlencode %} {% set issue_body = ( 'Documentation page: ' ~ doc_page ~ '\n' ~ 'Source page key: ' ~ pagename ~ '\n\n' ~ 'Describe the documentation issue here.' ) | urlencode %}

Found a documentation issue? Report it on GitHub .

{% endblock %}
